topic: Why your brain shrinks during pregnancy (and recovers)
caption: Did you know your brain can shrink up to 8% during pregnancy? 🤯 But don't worry, it recovers! 💆‍♀️ Here are the facts: pregnancy hormones cause brain changes, reducing gray matter. 🧠 However, after childbirth, the brain starts to recover. 🌟 Research shows that by 6 months postpartum, brain volume returns to pre-pregnancy levels. 📊 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future brain will thank you. 💕 #pregnancybrain #postpartumrecovery #brainhealth #hormones #pregnancyfacts #newmom #momlife
